title: containerImageRef.NewImageSource: merge the tar filters
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind bug

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Merge the two tar filters, if we need two, that we use when committing an image.  Try to improve passing of error information from the writing end of a pipe to the reader, so that it can be reported better.

#### How to verify it

New integration test!

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```
